items.title: Review auth token rotation pull request
items.body: Teammate is blocked on review before release freeze. Security labeled this high impact.

execution.definitionOfDone: PR receives actionable review or approval and release branch is unblocked.

items.title: Investigate flaky invoice export test
items.body: CI noise causing one retry per merge.

execution.definitionOfDone: Flaky test is either stabilized or quarantined with linked follow-up.
